import os output_dir = "/mnt/agents/output/dist_pages" os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True) # Shared head template head = ''' {title} | Global Banking Empowerment ''' # Shared nav nav = '''
Home Dashboard Send Money Cards Statements
''' # Shared footer footer = '''

Product

  • Dashboard
  • Send Money
  • Cards
  • Statements

Support

  • Help center
  • Security
  • Account
  • Contact

Legal

  • Privacy policy
  • Terms of service
  • Cookie policy
  • Licenses

© 2026 Global Banking Empowerment. All rights reserved.

''' # Close tags close = ''' ''' # ===================== DASHBOARD ===================== dashboard = head.format(title="Dashboard") + ''' ''' + nav.replace('href="dashboard.html"', 'href="dashboard.html" class="active"') + '''

Dashboard

Total balance

$93,270.00

Across 3 linked accounts

Send money View statements

Your accounts

Checking ****4521

$67,450.00

Savings ****8821

$22,340.00

Investment ****1192

$3,480.00

Recent activity

DateDescriptionAmountStatus
Jul 18Transfer to Sarah Mitchell-$2,500.00Completed
Jul 17Payroll deposit+$8,750.00Completed
Jul 15Amazon purchase-$147.32Completed
Jul 14Transfer from James Kim+$1,200.00Completed
Jul 12Utility bill-$89.50Completed
''' + footer + close # ===================== CARDS ===================== cards = head.format(title="Cards") + ''' ''' + nav.replace('href="cards.html"', 'href="cards.html" class="active"') + '''

Cards

**** **** **** 4521

ROBBIN LEE

09/28

Debit card

Card status Active
Online purchases Enabled
ATM withdrawals Enabled

**** **** **** 8821

ROBBIN LEE

12/27

Credit card

Card status Active
Credit limit $25,000
Current balance $3,240.00
''' + footer + close # ===================== HELP CENTER ===================== help_page = head.format(title="Help Center") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Help center

Getting started

  • How to open an account
  • Verifying your identity
  • Linking external accounts
  • Setting up direct deposit

Transfers & payments

  • How to send money
  • Transfer limits and fees
  • Wire transfer instructions
  • International transfers

Cards

  • Activating your card
  • Reporting a lost card
  • Disputing a charge
  • Cashback rewards

Security

  • Two-factor authentication
  • Recognizing phishing
  • Biometric login setup
  • Account recovery

Still need help?

Our support team is available 24/7.

Contact support
''' + footer + close # ===================== ACCOUNT ===================== account = head.format(title="Account") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Account settings

Profile

RL

Robbin Lee

robbin.lee@email.com

+1 (555) 123-4567

Notifications

Transaction alerts

Push and email for every transaction

On

Weekly summary

Email every Monday with account activity

On

Marketing emails

Product updates and offers

Off

Preferences

Language

English (US)

Time zone

Pacific Time (PT)

Paperless statements

Receive statements via email only

On
''' + footer + close # ===================== CONTACT ===================== contact = head.format(title="Contact") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Contact us

Phone support

1-800-GBE-BANK

Available 24/7

Secure messaging

In-app chat

Response within 5 minutes

Email

support@globalbankingempowerment.com

Response within 24 hours

Send us a message

Mailing address

Global Banking Empowerment
100 Financial Center Drive
San Francisco, CA 94111

''' + footer + close # ===================== PRIVACY POLICY ===================== privacy = head.format(title="Privacy Policy") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Privacy policy

Last updated: July 1, 2026

1. Information we collect

We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email, phone number, address, and financial information when you open an account or use our services.

We also collect information automatically, including device information, IP address, browser type, and usage data through cookies and similar technologies.

2. How we use your information

We use your information to:

  • Provide and maintain our banking services
  • Process transactions and send notifications
  • Detect and prevent fraud and security incidents
  • Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
  • Improve our products and services

3. Information sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with:

  • Service providers who perform services on our behalf
  • Financial partners for processing transactions
  • Regulatory authorities when required by law
  • Law enforcement in response to valid legal requests

4. Data security

We implement industry-standard security measures including 256-bit AES encryption, multi-factor authentication, and regular security audits to protect your information.

5. Your rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of certain data collection and marketing communications.

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@globalbankingempowerment.com.

''' + footer + close # ===================== TERMS OF SERVICE ===================== terms = head.format(title="Terms of Service") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Terms of service

Last updated: July 1, 2026

1. Agreement to terms

By accessing or using Global Banking Empowerment services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use our services.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old and a legal resident of the United States to open an account. You must provide accurate and complete information during registration.

3. Account responsibilities

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

You may not use our services for illegal activities, including money laundering, fraud, or sanctions violations.

4. Fees and charges

Certain services may incur fees, which will be disclosed before you complete a transaction. We reserve the right to change our fee structure with 30 days notice.

5. Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Global Banking Empowerment shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

6. Termination

We may suspend or terminate your account for violations of these terms or for security reasons. You may close your account at any time by contacting support.

''' + footer + close # ===================== COOKIE POLICY ===================== cookies = head.format(title="Cookie Policy") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Cookie policy

Last updated: July 1, 2026

What are cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us recognize your device, remember your preferences, and improve your experience.

Types of cookies we use

Essential cookies

These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core features like secure login and account access.

Analytics cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous usage data.

Functional cookies

These cookies remember your preferences, such as language settings and display options, to enhance your experience.

Marketing cookies

These cookies track your browsing habits to deliver relevant advertisements. You can opt out of these cookies.

Managing cookies

You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality.

To update your cookie preferences, visit your account settings.

''' + footer + close # ===================== LICENSES ===================== licenses = head.format(title="Licenses") + ''' ''' + nav + '''

Licenses

Last updated: July 1, 2026

Banking licenses

Global Banking Empowerment operates under the following licenses and regulatory authorizations:

  • Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) — Certificate #35241
  • Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) — National Bank Charter
  • Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) — Registered lender
  • FinCEN — Money Services Business registration

State licenses

We are licensed to operate in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Specific state licenses are available upon request.

Third-party software

Our platform incorporates the following open-source and licensed software:

  • Normalize.css — MIT License
  • Inter font family — SIL Open Font License
  • Chart.js — MIT License
  • Axios — MIT License

Trademarks

Global Banking Empowerment, GBE, and associated logos are registered trademarks of Global Banking Empowerment, Inc. All rights reserved.

''' + footer + close # Write all files pages = { "dashboard.html": dashboard, "cards.html": cards, "help.html": help_page, "account.html": account, "contact.html": contact, "privacy.html": privacy, "terms.html": terms, "cookies.html": cookies, "licenses.html": licenses, } for filename, content in pages.items(): filepath = os.path.join(output_dir, filename) with open(filepath, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(content) print(f"✅ Created {filename} ({len(content)} chars)") print(f"\n📁 All 9 files saved to: {output_dir}")
